steps.expected: OrgChart page loads with agent hierarchy
steps.observed: Page loaded with title 'AGENCY' and two agent cards in tree layout

steps.expected: SVG tree layout with connector paths
steps.observed: Found 22 SVGs including a full-width/height SVG overlay (100%x100%) with 1 path element for connector lines, plus lucide icon SVGs

steps.expected: Root agents at top, children below with parent-child relationships
steps.observed: CEO card positioned at top level, Founding Engineer card below — consistent with reports_to hierarchy. Both cards rendered from Supabase data.

evidence.network: Supabase queries loaded agent data successfully

steps.action: Identify zoom controls on OrgChart page
steps.observed: Three control buttons found: 'Zoom in' (+), 'Zoom out' (-), 'Fit chart to screen' (Fit)

steps.expected: Chart zooms in, cards appear larger
steps.observed: Cards enlarged significantly, partially out of view — zoom in working correctly

steps.expected: View resets to fit all content
steps.observed: View reset to show both agent cards centered and fully visible

assertions.title: Agent cards show status and metadata

steps.expected: Name, role label, status dot, adapter type displayed
steps.observed: Card shows: name 'CEO', role 'CEO', adapter 'Claude', status indicator dot (gray, rgb(163,163,163)) on avatar

steps.expected: Name, role label, status dot, adapter type displayed
steps.observed: Card shows: name 'Founding Engineer', role 'Founding Engineer', adapter 'Codex', status indicator dot (cyan, rgb(34,211,238)) on avatar
Two different colors confirmed: gray dot for CEO (likely idle/offline) and cyan dot for Founding Engineer (likely running/active) — color-coded by status
Dashboard loaded with 4 MetricCards at the top
Shows '2 Agents' with subtitle '1 running, 0 active' — clickable link
Shows '2 Open Issues' with subtitle '1 in progress, 1 blocked' — clickable link
Shows '1 Live Runs' with subtitle '0 succeeded, 1 failed' — clickable link
Shows '1 Pending Approvals' with subtitle 'Awaiting review' — clickable link

evidence.network: Supabase queries returned real counts for agents, issues, runs, and approvals

steps.expected: Bar chart with data from runs table
steps.observed: Run Activity chart rendered with 'Last 14 days' subtitle, date axis (3/3, 3/9, 3/16), and bar data visible
Issues by Priority chart rendered with colored bars and legend: Critical (red), High (green), Medium (yellow), Low (gray)
Issues by Status chart rendered with colored bars and legend: In Progress (purple), Blocked (red)
Success Rate chart rendered with 'Last 14 days' subtitle and date axis

evidence.network: Supabase queries for runs and issues data

assertions.title: Active agents panel shows running agents

steps.action: Check Active Agents panel on dashboard
steps.expected: Panel showing agents with active/running status
steps.observed: ACTIVE AGENTS section visible below metric cards. Shows 'Founding Engineer' with cyan status dot, 'Running · Codex' status text, and role 'Founding Engineer'

evidence.network: Supabase query returned agents with running status

assertions.title: Recent activity and urgent issues populated

steps.action: Scroll down to Urgent/Blocked Issues section
steps.observed: Section titled 'Urgent / Blocked Issues' with subtitle 'Critical, high-priority, or blocked work items.' Shows: ACM-1 (blocked) 'Create your CEO HEARTBEAT.md', ACM-2 (in_progress) 'Wire the dark shell into Lovable'

Section titled 'Recent Activity' with subtitle 'Latest events from the company timeline.' Shows: 'approval requested' — 'Requested approval for the CEO heartbeat outline.' (29M AGO), 'run started' — 'Started implementation for the Lovable cockpit shell.' (10M AGO)

evidence.network: Supabase queries for issues and activity_events tables

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 7 passed, 0 failed. OrgChart renders agent hierarchy with SVG connector lines, zoom/pan controls (+/-/Fit) work correctly, agent cards display name/role/status-dot/adapter. Dashboard shows 4 MetricCards with real Supabase counts (2 agents, 2 issues, 1 run, 1 approval), 4 bar charts (RunActivity, Priority, IssueStatus, SuccessRate), ActiveAgentsPanel with running agent, and populated Urgent Issues and Recent Activity sections.
